title: Dorothy Ross (historian)
body: Dorothy Ross (August 13, 1936 – May 22, 2024) was an American historian of social science. She was Arthur O. Lovejoy Professor of History at Johns Hopkins University. Her books include G. Stanley Hall: The Psychologist as Prophet (1972) and The Origins of American Social Science (1991).
categories: All Wikipedia articles written in American English
